title: Inability to Conceive - Unexplained Infertility
chief_complaint: 34-year-old female trying to conceive for 2 years without success. Regular menstrual cycles (28-30 days). Partner's semen analysis normal. HSG shows patent tubes. Ovarian reserve normal.

hidden_data.semen_analysis: Partner: Count 45 million, motility 55%, morphology 8% (all normal)

key_learning_points: Infertility: >1 year unprotected intercourse without conception (<35 years)
Basic workup: semen analysis, HSG, ovarian reserve
Treatment: ovulation induction + IUI for 3-4 cycles, then IVF
Age is most important prognostic factor

patient_responses.trying: We've been trying for 2 years, tracking ovulation

feedback.incorrect_message: This is unexplained infertility. All tests are normal.
feedback.attending_note: Unexplained infertility: Clomiphene or letrozole + IUI for 3-4 cycles. If unsuccessful, IVF. Success rates: IUI 10-15%/cycle, IVF 40-50%/cycle at age 34. Lifestyle: healthy weight, folic acid, smoking cessation.
